title: Elevator Safety Notice
scenario: Create a safety notice for an elevator that will be displayed on a screen inside the elevator. The notice should contain essential safety information, such as the emergency phone number, evacuation procedures, and a statement encouraging users to report any issues. The notice should be concise, clear, and easy to read. Keep it under 300 words.
constraints: Must be in a standard business font

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 250 words and is written in a standard business font.
Check if the text is clear, concise, and easy to read.
Check if the text contains the essential safety information required.
